title: The Clear Quran by Dr. Mustafa Khattab
description: A highly readable modern English translation of the Quran, praised for its clarity and accessibility for new Muslims.

title: Welcome to Islam by Mustafa Umar
description: A practical new-Muslim guide covering the essentials of faith, worship, and daily life in a warm, step-by-step format.

title: Quran.com
description: Free web and mobile app offering multiple Quran translations, transliterations, and audio recitations by renowned reciters.

title: Muslim Pro
description: Popular all-in-one app with accurate prayer times, Quran with audio, qibla compass, and halal restaurant finder.

title: Yaqeen Institute for Islamic Research
description: Research-based articles, videos, and infographics addressing faith questions, spirituality, and contemporary issues in Islam.

title: Bayyinah TV
description: Ustadh Nouman Ali Khan's platform offering engaging Quran and Arabic courses designed for all levels, including complete beginners.

title: ICNA New Muslim Support
description: ICNA provides mentorship programs, local community connections, and educational resources specifically for new Muslims across North America.

title: WhyIslam
description: A national outreach project offering free literature, one-on-one conversations, and local convert support through a toll-free helpline.

title: My Prayer (Salah) - A Step-by-Step Guide
description: Illustrated, easy-to-follow guide walking through each position and recitation in the five daily prayers.

title: New Muslim Guide
description: Comprehensive online resource covering worship, beliefs, and daily life essentials for those who have recently embraced Islam.

title: Full Quran Recitation by Mishary Rashid Alafasy
description: Beautiful, clear recitation of the entire Quran, helpful for learning proper pronunciation and developing a listening habit.

title: Ramadan Prep Guide by Yaqeen Institute
description: Practical tips, spiritual reflections, and daily schedules to help new Muslims prepare for and make the most of Ramadan.

title: Khalil Center - Muslim Mental Health
description: A psychological and spiritual community wellness center offering faith-sensitive therapy and support groups for Muslims.

title: Mental Health and the Muslim Convert Experience
description: An in-depth exploration of the unique emotional and psychological challenges converts face, with practical coping strategies.

title: SeekersGuidance
description: Free, reliable online courses and Q&A on Islamic sciences taught by qualified scholars, ideal for building a strong knowledge foundation.

title: Being Muslim: A Practical Guide by Asad Tarsin
description: A well-organized practical handbook covering worship, spirituality, and community life, written with new and returning Muslims in mind.

title: A Simple Guide to Halal Living
description: Clear overview of halal dietary guidelines, including how to identify halal food, read labels, and navigate grocery shopping.

title: The Seerah Podcast by Yasir Qadhi
description: An extensive, engaging series on the life of Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him), providing historical context and spiritual lessons.

title: How to Perform Wudu (Ablution)
description: Short, visual tutorial demonstrating the steps of wudu (ritual purification before prayer) clearly and simply.

title: IslamicFinder Zakat Calculator
description: Free online tool to calculate your annual zakat obligation based on current gold/silver prices and your financial details.

title: Inspiring Convert Stories - The Deen Show
description: Video interviews and stories from people who embraced Islam, offering encouragement and a sense of belonging for new converts.

title: Fortress of the Muslim (Hisn al-Muslim)
description: A widely used collection of authentic daily supplications (duas) for every occasion, available as a free downloadable PDF.

title: AboutIslam - New Muslims Section
description: Articles, FAQs, and personal stories tailored specifically for new Muslims navigating faith, identity, and community.

title: Tarteel AI - Quran Recitation Helper
description: AI-powered app that listens to your Quran recitation and provides real-time feedback to help improve your pronunciation.

title: A Guide to Ghusl and Purification
description: Step-by-step explanation of ghusl (full ritual bath) and the different types of purification in Islam.
